---
name: ✨ Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or a new capability for the analyzer
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear, concise description of the problem. Example: *"Extraction misses
figures whose captions sit above the plot..."*

## Describe the solution you'd like

What you want to happen, and — if relevant — where it fits in the pipeline:

- [ ] Stage 1 — Layout parsing & high-res cropping (`src/parsing`)
- [ ] Stage 2 — Contextual enrichment / multimodal RAG (`src/rag`)
- [ ] Stage 3 — VLM querying (`src/vision`)
- [ ] Stage 4 — Streamlit dashboard (`src/api`)
- [ ] Other (docs, packaging, CI, ...)

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Other approaches or workarounds you've evaluated.

## Example papers / figures

Links to public PDFs (e.g. arXiv) that would benefit from this feature.

## Additional context

Mockups, sketches, references to related projects, etc.
